_info.description:
Test rejection of blocks where the `excessBlobGas` does not increase from
zero, even when the included blobs is above target.

Test is parametrized to `[TARGET_BLOBS_PER_BLOCK+1, MAX_BLOBS_PER_BLOCK]`
new blobs.
